"Policyowner has no say where the investment will go but can choose the premium mode" is a different statement than the one this question is testing. The correct answer is "Policyowner controls where the investment will go and selects the amount of the premium payment" because that statement is the one that matches the rule being tested.

"The investment vehicle for this type of policy is held in the insurer's general portfolio" is a different statement than the one this question is testing. The correct answer is "Policyowner controls where the investment will go and selects the amount of the premium payment" because that statement is the one that matches the rule being tested.

"The death benefit can vary but the policyowner has no say in the premium amount paid" is a different statement than the one this question is testing. The correct answer is "Policyowner controls where the investment will go and selects the amount of the premium payment" because that statement is the one that matches the rule being tested.
